name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Free house for rural families who have no pucca house
benefit: 1,20,000 to 1,30,000 for house construction

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: 6000 per year cash support for farmers
benefit: 6,000 per year paid in 3 instalments

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Free health insurance up to 5 lakh per year
benefit: 5,00,000 health cover per family per year

name: PM Mudra Loan Yojana
description: Low interest business loans for small entrepreneurs
benefit: Loan from 50,000 up to 10,00,000

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Central scholarships for students from poor families
benefit: 10,000 to 25,000 per year

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension after age 60 for unorganised workers
benefit: 1,000 to 5,000 per month pension after age 60

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Low cost life insurance for working age people
benefit: 2,00,000 insurance cover at just 436 per year

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance for all citizens
benefit: 2,00,000 accident cover at just 20 per year

name: Telangana Rythu Bandhu
description: Investment support for farmers in Telangana
benefit: 10,000 per acre per year

name: PMEGP Self Employment Loan
description: Subsidy loan for starting a new business
benefit: 15 to 35 percent subsidy on loans up to 25 lakh

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connection for BPL women
benefit: Free LPG connection plus first cylinder free

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: High interest savings scheme for girl child
benefit: 8.2 percent interest rate on savings tax free
apply_link: Visit nearest post office or bank

name: PM SVANidhi Street Vendor Loan
description: Working capital loan for street vendors
benefit: 10,000 initial loan up to 50,000 after repayment

name: Telangana KCR Kit
description: Baby kit and cash support for pregnant women in Telangana
benefit: 12,000 cash plus baby kit worth 3,000

name: Telangana Aasara Pension
description: Monthly pension for poor elderly disabled and widows in Telangana
benefit: 2,016 to 3,016 per month depending on category

name: Telangana Kalyana Lakshmi
description: Financial support for marriage of SC ST BC minority girls in Telangana
benefit: 1,00,116 for SC ST and 51,116 for BC minority

name: Telangana TS ePass Scholarship
description: Full scholarship for SC ST BC students in Telangana colleges
benefit: Full tuition fee plus maintenance allowance

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Free zero balance bank account for all citizens
benefit: Free bank account plus 10,000 overdraft plus accident insurance

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Flexible credit for farmers for agricultural needs
benefit: Credit up to 3 lakh at 4 percent interest rate

name: NREGA Job Card
description: Guaranteed 100 days of paid work per year for rural families
benefit: 100 days of work at minimum wage per year

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance for farmers against natural disasters
benefit: Full crop loss compensation at very low premium

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Pension scheme for senior citizens above 60
benefit: 10,000 per month pension guaranteed for 10 years

name: Stand Up India
description: Business loans for SC ST women entrepreneurs
benefit: Loans from 10 lakh to 1 crore for new businesses

name: PM Scholarship Scheme for Central Armed Police Forces
description: Scholarship for children of police and defence personnel
benefit: 2,500 per month for boys and 3,000 per month for girls

name: Telangana Unemployment Allowance
description: Monthly allowance for educated unemployed youth in Telangana
benefit: 3,016 per month for graduates and above

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Free food grains for poor families
benefit: 5 kg free rice or wheat per person per month
apply_link: Visit nearest ration shop with ration card

name: Telangana SC ST BC Overseas Scholarship
description: Full scholarship to study abroad for SC ST BC students from Telangana
benefit: Full tuition fee plus living allowance for studying abroad

name: National Family Benefit Scheme
description: One time payment to BPL families on death of breadwinner
benefit: 20,000 one time payment
apply_link: Visit nearest district social welfare office

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Free skill training and certification for youth
benefit: Free skill training plus certificate plus job placement help

name: Telangana Shaadi Mubarak
description: Financial support for marriage of Muslim girls in Telangana
benefit: 1,00,116 financial assistance

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Free residential skill training for rural youth
benefit: Free training accommodation food and placement assistance

name: PM Awas Yojana Urban
description: Subsidy on home loan for urban poor to buy or build house
benefit: 2.67 lakh subsidy on home loan interest

name: Telangana Cheyutha Scheme
description: Financial support for BC ST SC minority women entrepreneurs in Telangana
benefit: 1,00,000 grant for starting small business

name: E Shram Card
description: National database registration for unorganised workers
benefit: 2,00,000 accident insurance plus priority for all government schemes

name: Telangana Rythu Bima
description: Life insurance for farmers in Telangana
benefit: 5,00,000 life insurance completely free for farmers
